dict.source: Flexcyon Style Settings
dict.target: Flexcyon 样式设置

dict.source: About
dict.target: 关于

dict.source: true
dict.target: 是

dict.source:
Flexcyon is a theme based around the Halcyon, Flexoki and Origami themes. You can find its [source code here](https://github.com/bladeacer/flexcyon).

It aims to be *reasonably opinionated and highly customisable*. If you are interested, feel free to learn more about the theme via the ==README and the documentation==. When it comes to customising this theme, installing and using the Settings Search plugin is highly recommended.
dict.target:
Flexcyon 是一款基于 Halcyon、Flexoki 和 Origami 主题的主题。您可以在 [此处](https://github.com/bladeacer/flexcyon) 找到其 [源代码](https://github.com/bladeacer/flexcyon)。

它旨在做到 *适度有主见且高度可定制*。如果您感兴趣，请通过 ==README 和文档== 了解更多关于该主题的信息。在自定义此主题时，强烈建议安装并使用 Settings Search 插件。

dict.source: Documentation
dict.target: 文档

dict.source:
For more information, check out the [documentation here](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/).

如果您更熟悉中文, 请 [单击此处](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/zh/) 查看中文文档。

For your own sanity when it comes to searching for settings, the Settings Search plugin is highly recommended.

A caveat of Style Settings is that it sometimes does not properly unload CSS classes. Hence, you would need to reload or restart your app for certain customisations to take effect. I am working to improve this.

Settings you would need to do this for include the status bar, workspace layouts, animations (and a few others)
dict.target:
如需更多信息，请查看 [此处文档](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/)。

如果您更熟悉中文，请 [单击此处](https://flexcyon.github.io/docs-en/zh/) 查看中文文档。

为了在搜索设置时保持理智，强烈建议使用 Settings Search 插件。

Style Settings 的一个注意事项是，它有时无法正确卸载 CSS 类。因此，您需要重新加载或重启应用程序才能使某些自定义设置生效。我正在努力改进这一点。

您需要为此重新加载或重启的应用程序设置包括状态栏、工作区布局、动画（以及其他几个）

dict.source: Modes
dict.target: 模式

dict.source: Some unique modes flexcyon has to offer. You are also able to configure accessibility settings here.
dict.target: Flexcyon 提供的一些独特模式。您还可以在此处配置无障碍设置。

dict.source: Extreme minimalism inspired by Shimmering Focus theme. Will override some Style Settings options. Will not work with Flex Max mode enabled.
dict.target: 受 Shimmering Focus 主题启发的极致极简主义。将覆盖部分样式设置选项。无法与 Flex Max 模式同时启用。

dict.source: An extremely opinionated set up which showcases the unique customisation in this theme, with features working out of the box. If some options are not too your taste you can disable this mode and customise the theme more yourself, it will reset the theme to a clean slate customisations wise. There are also other default options enabled which you may or may not like. Refer to the documentation for the list of options it enables on your behalf.
dict.target: 一种极度有主见的设置，展示了该主题的独特自定义功能，且开箱即用。如果您不喜欢某些选项，可以禁用此模式并自行进一步自定义，这将重置主题的自定义设置。此外，还启用了其他默认选项，您可能喜欢也可能不喜欢。请参阅文档以了解它为您启用的选项列表。

dict.source: Reduce opacity of all but the active line in source and live preview mode
dict.target: 在源码模式和实时预览模式下，降低非活动行的透明度。

dict.source: Enables vertical navigation style. Navigation icons like Files, new note and so on are displayed vertically much like stacked tabs.
dict.target: 启用垂直导航样式。导航图标（如文件、新建笔记等）垂直排列，类似于堆叠的标签页。

dict.source: Select the folder style, sometimes need to restart or force reload for it to take effect properly. Alternate folder style Adds padding for active file item, makes collapse icons and borders blue for active folders.
dict.target: 选择文件夹样式，有时需要重启或强制刷新才能生效。交替文件夹样式为活动文件项添加内边距，并将折叠图标和边框设为蓝色。

dict.source: Display smiley toggle icons in the UI
dict.target: 在界面中显示笑脸切换图标

dict.source: Replaces some icons with ASCII Icons, works best when used together with smiley icons. This will override the declarations by community plugins like Iconic for the specific icons targeted. This can be prevented with the setting below.
dict.target: 用 ASCII 图标替换部分图标，与笑脸图标配合使用效果最佳。这将覆盖社区插件（如 Iconic）对特定图标的声明。可通过下方设置防止此行为。

dict.source: Ensure community plugins which modify icons have their modifications take precedence over this theme's. Smiley Icons and ASCII Icons will not render when said community plugins are enabled and this setting is enabled. This setting currently only works with the Iconic plugin, as adding support for all icon related plugins negatively affects performance too much.
dict.target: 确保修改图标的社区插件的优先级高于此主题。当启用此类插件和此设置时，笑脸图标和 ASCII 图标将不显示。此设置目前仅适用于 Iconic 插件，因为支持所有图标相关插件会严重影响性能。

dict.source: Display coloured icons for buttons in setting like uninstall, options, hotkeys, etc.
dict.target: 为设置中的按钮（如卸载、选项、快捷键等）显示彩色图标

dict.source: Stylise pin icons in the sidebars
dict.target: 美化侧边栏中的固定图标

dict.source: Customise the appearance of inputs
dict.target: 自定义输入框的外观

dict.source: Customise the appearance of settings
dict.target: 自定义设置的外观

dict.source: Enable installed tooltip effects such as subtle dimming of community items and fixing positioning of installed tooltip in community items.
dict.target: 启用已安装的提示框效果，例如淡化社区项目并修复社区项目中已安装提示框的位置。

dict.source: Control the left margin of the installed tooltip
dict.target: 控制已安装提示框的左边距

dict.source: Do not show scrollbar in settings where it is not necessary.
dict.target: 在不需要滚动条的地方不显示滚动条。

dict.source: Configure the appearance for style settings
dict.target: 配置样式设置的外观

dict.source: Dims collapsed Style Settings headings, useful for navigating larger or heavily nested Style Settings.
dict.target: 淡化折叠的样式设置标题，便于浏览较大的或嵌套较深的样式设置。

dict.source: Style settings related to supported plugins
dict.target: 与支持插件相关的样式设置

dict.source: Used in alternate file tree files

dict.source: Remove file tree header
dict.target: 移除文件树标题

dict.source: Alternate folder count style, shows count on hover
dict.target: 切换文件夹计数样式，悬停时显示计数

dict.source: Toggle the blur effect of inactive canvas nodes.
dict.target: 切换未激活画布节点的模糊效果

dict.source: How intense the blur effect is when the blur inactive canvas nodes mode is on
dict.target: 开启未激活画布节点模糊模式时的模糊强度

dict.target: 用于配置 Various Complements 插件

dict.source: Overrides defaults. Uses padding 4px 8px.
dict.target: 覆盖默认值。使用 4px 8px 间距。

dict.target: 用于配置 Omnisearch 插件

dict.source: Removes Omnisearch search result icons.
dict.target: 移除 Omnisearch 搜索结果图标。

dict.source: For configuring the core Bases plugin
dict.target: 用于配置核心 Bases 插件

dict.source: Sets vertical padding for Base file content
dict.target: 设置 Base 文件内容的垂直间距

dict.source: Sets horizontal padding for Base file content
dict.target: 设置 Base 文件内容的水平间距

dict.source: Sets padding for Base embeds
dict.target: 设置基础嵌入内容的内边距。

dict.source: Opacity of Labels in Cards View
dict.target: 卡片视图中标签的不透明度。

dict.source: This is the factor of how long the Card View takes to scale depending on tab size.
dict.target: 这取决于标签页大小，卡片视图缩放所需的时间因子。

dict.source: Vim mode text, new tab appearance, side dock icons, tooltip radius, background images
dict.target: Vim 模式文本、新标签页外观、侧边栏图标、工具提示半径、背景图片。

dict.source: Text to display modes when using built-in vim bindings, inherits style and color from status bar style
dict.target: 使用内置 Vim 绑定时显示的模式文本，继承自状态栏样式。

dict.source: Enable text for displaying current vim mode
dict.target: 启用显示当前 Vim 模式的文本。

dict.source: How far from the left of the screen the current vim mode text is (as the number gets greater, the text moves to the right of the screen)
dict.target: 当前 Vim 模式文本距离屏幕左侧的距离（数值越大，文本越靠右）。

dict.source: How far from the bottom of the screen the current vim mode text is (as the number gets greater, the text moves higher up the screen)
dict.target: 当前 Vim 模式文本距离屏幕底部的距离（数值越大，文本越靠上）。

dict.source: Text to display when in insert mode
dict.target: 插入模式下显示的文本。

dict.source: Text to display when in normal mode
dict.target: 普通模式下显示的文本。

dict.source: Text to display when in command mode
dict.target: 在命令模式下显示的文本

dict.source: Customise the appearance of new tabs. Type backslash character and a to pass it as a newline in ASCII art and other input values.
dict.target: 自定义新标签页的外观。输入反斜杠和 a 以在 ASCII 艺术和其他输入值中作为换行符传递。

dict.source: ASCII art
dict.target: ASCII 艺术

dict.source: Quote
dict.target: 引用

dict.source: Background color for the add before empty state title, accepts CSS variables.
dict.target: 添加到空状态标题的背景颜色，接受 CSS 变量。

dict.source: The quote that will be displayed
dict.target: 将要显示的引用

dict.source: The prefix before the quote attribution
dict.target: 引用归属前的前缀

dict.source: The quote attribution
dict.target: 引用归属

dict.source: ASCII art to display in new tab. Will also appear in other parts of the UI like core Slides plugin pause presentation mode.
dict.target: 在新标签页中显示的 ASCII 艺术。也会出现在 UI 的其他部分，例如核心幻灯片插件暂停演示模式。

dict.source: The maximum size of the ASCII art
dict.target: ASCII 艺术的最大尺寸

dict.source: The line height of the ASCII art and quotes.
dict.target: ASCII 艺术和引用的行高

dict.source: The scale of the ASCII art
dict.target: ASCII 艺术的缩放比例

dict.source: Toggle the empty state title
dict.target: 切换空状态标题

dict.source: Toggle the empty state actions
dict.target: 切换空状态操作

dict.target: 启用侧边栏图标颜色，悬停时变暗

dict.target: 配置左侧工作区 Ribbon 的宽度

dict.target: 配置左右侧边栏的背景图片

dict.source: Overrides background image declaration below, configures in both left and right sidebar
dict.target: 覆盖下方背景图片声明，同时配置左右侧边栏

dict.target: 网格

dict.target: 配置设置菜单、提示等界面的背景图片

dict.source: Sets how dark the modal background is. A higher value dims background content better.
dict.target: 设置模态框背景的深浅。数值越高，背景内容越暗。
